gigs.name: Soap Product Photography
gigs.subtitle: Cozy/rustic scenes for Etsy soap sellers

steps.text: Add cozy/rustic templates to pipeline
Generate 3 portfolio images with a real soap photo
Create Fiverr gig with correct category and description
Set Basic $10 / Standard $20 / Premium $35 packages
Offer first 3 orders at $5 to build reviews fast
Reach 5 reviews, raise to full price
Swap portfolio images for real buyer soap photos after first orders

gigs.name: Candle Product Photography
gigs.subtitle: Cozy scenes for Etsy candle sellers

steps.text: Add candle templates to pipeline (already done)
Get or create a candle photo to use for portfolio
Drag candle photo onto 'Candle Orders' shortcut to generate portfolio
Pick 3 best output images for Fiverr portfolio
Create Fiverr gig: same structure as soap gig, swap 'soap' for 'candle'
Set Basic $10 / Standard $20 / Premium $35 packages
Offer first 3 orders at $5 to build reviews fast
Reach 5 reviews, raise to full price

gigs.name: Jewelry & Accessories Product Photos
gigs.subtitle: Elegant styled scenes for Etsy jewelry sellers

steps.text: Add 'jewelry' product type + 8 templates to templates.py (velvet tray, marble, linen, etc.)
Add 'jewelry' to PRODUCT_TEMPLATES in templates.py
Create go_jewelry.bat and Desktop shortcut
Add Jewelry radio button to dashboard New Order modal
Test pipeline with a jewelry photo (rings, necklaces, earrings)
Generate 3 portfolio images, pick the best
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will create professional product photos for handmade jewelry'
Offer first 3 orders at $5 to build reviews

gigs.name: Custom AI Pet Portraits
gigs.subtitle: Stylized oil painting, watercolor, royal portrait styles

steps.text: Add 'pet' product type + 8 style templates (oil painting, watercolor, royal portrait, superhero, cartoon, renaissance, anime, botanical)
Test pipeline with a pet photo (use any dog/cat stock photo)
Generate 3 portfolio images across different styles
Create go_pets.bat and Desktop shortcut
Add Pet Portraits to dashboard New Order modal
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will create a custom AI portrait of your pet'
Set Basic $15 (1 style) / Standard $30 (3 styles) / Premium $50 (all 8 styles)
Offer first 3 orders at $8 to build reviews

gigs.name: Real Estate Virtual Staging
gigs.subtitle: Empty rooms transformed into furnished lifestyle spaces

steps.text: Add 8 interior style templates to templates.py
Add 'staging' to PRODUCT_TEMPLATES and dashboard modal
Create go_staging.bat and Desktop shortcut
Find or generate a test empty room photo (use Google Images: 'empty living room')
Drag room photo onto 'Staging Orders' shortcut to generate portfolio
Pick 3 best before/after pairs for Fiverr portfolio
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will virtually stage your empty room with AI'
Set Basic $25 (1 room, 2 styles) / Standard $60 (3 rooms) / Premium $120 (6 rooms)
Target real estate agents in description: 'MLS-ready virtual staging in 24 hours'
Offer first 3 orders at $15 to build reviews

gigs.name: Lifestyle Background Packs
gigs.subtitle: E-commerce scene packs sellers use for their own product photos

steps.text: Run pipeline without a product photo to generate pure background scenes (modify generate.py to allow no reference)
Create 5 themed packs: Spa/Skincare, Rustic Kitchen, Farmhouse, Holiday, Luxury
Generate 20 backgrounds per pack (100 total)
Zip each pack and store in output/background_packs/
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will create AI lifestyle backgrounds for your product photos'
Set Basic $15 (5 backgrounds, 1 theme) / Standard $30 (15 backgrounds) / Premium $50 (30 backgrounds, 3 themes)
This gig requires no buyer photo — deliver pre-made packs, lowest effort gig
Research Flux PuLID or fal.ai portrait model for face-preserving headshots
Set up headshot pipeline: buyer selfie → face lock → professional background
Create 10 background templates (office blur, outdoor, neutral gray, bookshelf, etc.)
Test with your own photo — verify likeness is preserved
Generate 5 portfolio before/after examples
Add Headshots to dashboard New Order modal
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will create professional AI LinkedIn headshots from your selfies'
Set Basic $20 (5 headshots) / Standard $40 (15) / Premium $75 (30)
Specialize: target tech workers, job seekers, remote teams in description
Create genre style packs: Thriller, Romance, Fantasy, Self-Help, Mystery (8 prompts each)
Create Canva templates for each genre: correct KDP dimensions, font treatments, spine layout
Generate 3 sample covers per genre for portfolio (15 total)
Build workflow: Flux generates artwork → download → drop into Canva template → add buyer's title/name → export
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will design an AI book cover for your Amazon KDP novel'
Set Basic $20 (1 cover) / Standard $40 (3 variations) / Premium $75 (full series pack)
Note: this gig is 75% automated — manual step is Canva text layout per order (5-10 min)

gigs.name: Interior Design Visualization
gigs.subtitle: Room redesigns in any style for homeowners and Airbnb hosts

steps.text: Add 'interior' product type + 8 style templates (Scandinavian, modern farmhouse, Japanese minimalist, bohemian, industrial, coastal, luxury, mid-century)
Test with a room photo (use a stock photo of a living room)
Generate 3 before/after pairs for portfolio
Add Interior Design to dashboard New Order modal
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will redesign your room with AI interior visualization'
Target Airbnb hosts in description: 'See your space as a styled Airbnb listing before you renovate'
Set Basic $25 (1 room, 2 styles) / Standard $60 (3 rooms) / Premium $100 (5 rooms, 3 styles each)
Offer first 3 orders at $15 to build reviews

gigs.name: Children's Book Illustration
gigs.subtitle: Consistent character illustrations for self-published kids books

steps.text: Research character consistency workflow: IP-Adapter + Flux Kontext for locking character look across scenes
Create 5 illustration style templates: watercolor storybook, cartoon flat-color, pencil sketch, digital painting, vintage
Test with a character description + sample scenes (3 page test)
Generate a 5-page sample book spread as portfolio
Create Fiverr gig: 'I will illustrate your children's book with consistent AI art'
Set Basic $50 (5 illustrations) / Standard $120 (15 illustrations) / Premium $250 (30 illustrations)
Note: this is the most manual gig (30-40% hands-on per order) — save for last
Specialize by style to reduce variables: launch with watercolor storybook only first
